HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

6#include "JobParser.h"
7#include "iofunctions.h"

9//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
10// Consrtuctors
11//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
13JobParser::JobParser() {}
14
20JobParser::JobParser(std::string jobFile) {
21 reader.open(jobFile.c_str());
22 if (!reader.is_open()) {
23 std::cout << "Error opening job file: " << jobFile << std::endl;
24 reader.close();
25 }
26}
27
28//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
29// File control
30//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
32int JobParser::close() {
33 reader.close();
34 return 0;
35}
36
38bool JobParser::empty() {
39 if (tags.size() == 0) {
40 return true;
41 } else {
42 return false;
43 }
44}
45
50int JobParser::open(std::string jobFile) {
51 reader.open(jobFile.c_str());
52 if (!reader.is_open()) {
53 std::cout << "Error opening job file: " << jobFile << std::endl;
54 reader.close();
55 return 1;
56 } else {
57 return 0;
58 }
59}
60
61//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
62// Tag navigation
63//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
75std::string JobParser::readTag() {
76 char id;
77 nextChar();
78 reader.get(id);
79 reader.unget();
80 if (id == '<') {
81 reader.get(id);
82 reader >> tag;
83 tag = tag.replace(tag.size() - 1, 1, "");
84 if (tag[0] != '/') {
85 tags.push_back(tag);
86 } else {
87 std::string comp(tag);
88 if (comp.replace(0, 1, "") == JobParser::getTag()) {
89 tags.pop_back();
90 } else {
91 std::cout << "Incorrect use of tags in job file" << std::endl;
92 }
93 }
94 }
95 if (tags.size() != 0) {
96 return tags.back();
97 }
98
99 return "";
100}
101
103std::string JobParser::lastRead() { return tag; }
104
105
110int JobParser::nextChar() {
111 char id;
112 reader.get(id);
113 while (((id == ' ') || (id == '\n') || (id == '\r') || (id == '\t')) &&
114 (!reader.eof())) {
115 reader.get(id);
116 }
117 reader.unget();
118 return 0;
119}
120
122std::string JobParser::getTag() {
123 if (tags.size() != 0) {
124 return tags.back();
125 } else {
126 return "";
127 }
128}
129
130//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
131// Block helpers
132//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
133
134
141int JobParser::endOfTag() {
142 std::string endTag("</" + getTag() + ">");
143 std::string word;
144 while (reader >> word && word != endTag) {
145 }
146 return 0;
147}
148
150int JobParser::moveTop() {
151 reader.seekg(0, reader.beg);
152 return 0;
153}
JobParser.h
Lightweight XML-like tag parser for the solver job file.

int endOfTag()
Skip tokens until the matching closing tag of the current block.
